arguments.argument:
if oDecimatorV2.bossProgress=4 and oDecimatorV2.progTime>=70 and progress=2 { playSound(global.snd_BombExplode,0,1,15000) var tEffect; tEffect=instance_create(x,y-32,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sBombExplosion; tEffect.image_speed=0.5; tEffect.image_xscale=2; tEffect.image_yscale=2 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0
oDecimatorV2.bAimAtJohn=0; oDecimatorV2.progTime=0; oDecimatorV2.missileDelay=360; oDecimatorV2.bossProgress+=1 sprite_index=sNPC_John_Jump; image_speed=0.33 y-=28 progress=3 }
